## [09:07 - 10:39]

Putting up in social media, starting a blog. But you want to start on your own products almost immediately. It'll take you a little time to get them done and get the process put together. So but go ahead and start working on that. So get the affiliate marketing going. Hopefully start building a list while you're doing affiliate marketing and start building your products immediately. Because once, even once your business is cranking along and you've got a bunch of products you're making sales, the reality is you'll never be able to keep up with the business. The demand from your market. So if you've got, if you're teaching about how to play guitar, how to learn guitar, no matter how many products you create, your clients and prospects will want more. You'll never, the market is insatiable. They want more and more products and you're never going to be able to meet the demand. If you think that people are only going to buy from you and you alone, then you're delusional. It's just, it's, it isn't the way it works. Someone who buys from you is going to buy from your competitors. So you might as well act as an affiliate for your competitors. Stop thinking in terms of competitors. Start thinking in terms of partners. And that is the real answer to this business is you want to be selling affiliate products and you want to be selling your own products. So the path is generally you start with affiliate products, then you move to focusing on your own products and then you move to focusing on both. And that's really the answer to product creation versus affiliate marketing.
